title: Address PR 1073 review boundary feedback

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Address PR #1073 review feedback after scope correction: make Tier 3, Tier 4, and Tier 5 completion explicit and honest while leaving #892 open for Tier 6.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep scope limited to Tier 3-5 closeout truth, Tier 6 blocker routing, python.function.call portability, guarded when semantics, and validation/PR wording.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Use the smallest code, schema, test, blocker-report, planning-state, and PR metadata edits that make those boundaries mechanically visible.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Validate the review-boundary fixes and update PR evidence.
completion_criteria: Address PR 1073 review boundary feedback is implemented, validated, and closed out honestly.

goal: Address PR #1073 review feedback after scope correction: make Tier 3, Tier 4, and Tier 5 completion explicit and honest while leaving #892 open for Tier 6.
non_goals: Do not complete #892 or the final Python completion gate.
Do not add a general workflow-options engine or broaden guarded step selection into a DSL.
Do not make python.function.call count as portable primitive coverage.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: Only command-generation primitive executor/conformance, operation schema, contract checker/tests, #892 decomposition, this execplan, and PR metadata.
execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py; uv run python packages/command-generation/tests/primitive_conformance.py; uv run pytest tests/test_generated_command_package_proof_runner.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Ask before broadening beyond the promoted item.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Unrelated backlog, adjacent modules, or canonical contracts not named by this plan.

stop_conditions.stop when: The work no longer matches the promoted item or its completion criteria.

stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: Implementation needs files outside the filled execution bounds.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: The selected proof cannot demonstrate the completion criteria.

execution_run.what happened: Addressed corrected PR #1073 review scope by preserving python.function.call as non-portable Tier 2 debt, constraining when guards to simple step selection, marking Tier 3-5 complete in decomposition outcome text, and routing remaining Python completion blockers to Tier 6.
execution_run.scope touched: command-generation primitive executor/conformance, operation schema, generated package checker/tests, #892 decomposition, and PR closeout planning.
execution_run.changed surfaces: operation schema, primitive executor, proof checker, focused tests, decomposition, and this closeout plan.
execution_run.validations run: uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --python-conformance; uv run python packages/command-generation/tests/primitive_conformance.py; uv run pytest tests/test_generated_command_package_proof_runner.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success; uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; make test-memory; make lint-memory; make test-workspace; make lint-workspace; make test-planning; make lint-planning
execution_run.result for continuation: Tier 3, Tier 4, and Tier 5 are complete for this checkpoint; #892 remains open for Tier 6 final Python completion promotion.
execution_run.next step: Push the PR update and verify CI.

finished_run_review.proof status: passed locally; CI rerun pending until push

delegation_outcome_feedback.route skipped reason: Small shared write set across checker, schema, tests, and planning state; delegation would add merge/reconciliation overhead.

delegation_outcome_feedback.decomposition adjustment: Tier 3, Tier 4, and Tier 5 outcome text now says complete for this checkpoint; remaining owner is Tier 6.

proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: Generated-package proof, python conformance, primitive conformance, focused tests, contract tooling, structured inventory, planning surfaces, and Memory/Workspace/Planning test+lint targets all passed locally.

durable_residue.learned constraint: Tier readiness value 'promoted' means selected/advanced in current decomposition schema, so completion must be stated in allowed outcome/proof/closeout fields until the schema grows a separate completion state.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: Avoid ambiguous completion language around broad #892 checkpoints.
durable_residue.promotion trigger: When Tier 6 final Python completion promotion is selected.

closure_check.accepted values: Accepted values: slice status = complete|completed|bounded slice complete; larger-intent status = closed|complete|completed for archive-and-close or open|partial|unfinished for archive-but-keep-lane-open; closure decision = archive-and-close|archive-but-keep-lane-open. Prefer `agentic-planning archive-plan <plan> --prepare-closeout` before hand-editing closeout fields.
closure_check.why this decision is honest: PR #1073 review feedback is addressed and validated locally, but #892 final Python completion remains blocked by Tier 6 final-promotion checks.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: python-completion-blockers report now names remaining_scope tier-6-final-python-completion-promotion and next_owner #892 / tier-6-final-python-completion-promotion.
closure_check.reopen trigger: CI failure or reviewer identifies remaining Tier 3-5 completion ambiguity.

improvement_signal_review.guidance: At closeout, report AW smoothness/helpfulness gaps, better-way signals, unused-feature reflections, and places AW could help more. Route each concrete signal to exactly one owner class unless explicitly split, or mark no_signal_found after checking.
